extract: Sinistea (Japanese: ヤバチャ Yabacha) is a Ghost-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves into Polteageist when exposed to a Cracked Pot or a Chipped Pot, depending on Sinistea's form. The Phony Form (which lacks a stamp of authenticity) requires a Cracked Pot to evolve. The Antique Form (which has a stamp of authenticity) requires a Chipped Pot to evolve. It bears a close resemblance to Poltchageist; however, the two are separate species.
